items.title: Nick Herbig deal raises obvious questions about the future of T.J. Watt, Alex Highsmith
items.summary: The Steelers' decision to move quickly to give linebacker Nick Herbig a four-year, $100 million extension makes the organization's feeling about the 2023 fourth-round pick clear.
